reasons: The Q2M5 workflow-role taxonomy is now explicit for CONTROL_THREAD, ORCHESTRATOR, REPO_EXECUTION, and EXPLORATION with allowed and blocked outputs documented.
The passalong schema and repo-routing target schema make routing and continuity contracts explicit without implementing workflow automation.
The motion is static canon only, preserves the workflow-role versus JAI-agent-role distinction, and does not expand execution, branch-write, or PR authority.
